description: Clarifier agent step schemas. Closure emits verdict in {ready-to-impl, ready-to-consider, still-blocked} for outputPhases routing (workflow.json). The orchestrator owns label mutations via labelMapping + computeLabelChanges — this agent MUST NOT edit labels directly.

closure.clarify.description: Clarify closure response — inspect a need-clearance issue, apply the 5-gate rubric, emit verdict and rationale. The orchestrator transitions the phase; this agent never touches labels or issue state.

summary.description: One-line human-readable summary of the clarify outcome.

action.description: Closure intent. Always 'closing' for single-iteration clarifier.

verdict.description: Routing verdict. 'ready-to-impl' → impl-pending (iterator). 'ready-to-consider' → consider-pending (considerer). 'still-blocked' → blocked (stays in clarify queue — a comment SHOULD record which gate failed).

rationale.description: Gate-by-gate breakdown. Each entry MUST name the gate and whether it passed. When verdict='still-blocked', at least one entry MUST be {pass:false}.

final_summary.description: One-paragraph recap of the verdict reasoning. Used as commentTemplates variable on handoff.
